entity.summary: Indonesia-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange established on February 15, 2014, operating an active digital-asset trading platform for users across the country.
entity.notes: Official Indodax material gives an exact establishment date of February 15, 2014. Current official and independent profiles confirm the continuing Indonesian exchange service.

expected.summary: Indonesia-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Indodax brand.

changes.summary: Indonesia-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange established on February 15, 2014, operating an active digital-asset trading platform for users across the country.
changes.notes: Official Indodax material gives an exact establishment date of February 15, 2014. Current official and independent profiles confirm the continuing Indonesian exchange service.

events.title: Indodax was established
events.description: Indodax was officially established in Indonesia on 2014-02-15 as a cryptocurrency trading platform.
events.notes: Exact establishment date is stated in official Indodax materials.

events.title: Indodax suffered a security incident and paused services
events.description: Indodax suffered a security incident on September 11, 2024, entered maintenance, and restored full operations after roughly 80 hours while stating that user funds remained safe.
events.notes: External estimates of the stolen amount varied, so this record does not adopt a single loss figure.

evidence.title: About Us
evidence.notes: Official company page states that Indodax was established in 2014.

evidence.title: INDODAX officially obtains full license as a physical crypto asset trader
evidence.notes: Official article states that Indodax was formally established on 2014-02-15.

evidence.title: Indodax official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Indodax identity and active exchange service.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Indodax
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Indodax identity, Indonesia registration, and 2014 establishment year.

evidence.title: Volume Transaksi Melebihi Setengah Triliun, INDODAX Kembali Dominasi Pasar Kripto Indonesia Paska Insiden
evidence.notes: Official recovery report records the September 11 incident, roughly 80-hour recovery, and full restoration of operations.

evidence.title: Indonesian Crypto Exchange Indodax Hacked for $22M; Pauses Activity Before Bigger Hit
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous reporting corroborates the hot-wallet incident and temporary service pause.
